title: The Shuffle Cannon
description: With the Shuffle Cannon, you can select a set of blocks and place them randomly with a single click, making it easier than ever to create textured builds, natural landscapes, or chaotic designs.
body:
![Banner](https://github.com/DiegoRevenga/the-shuffle-cannon/blob/main/assets/banner.png?raw=true) # The Shuffle Cannon ## Click. Shuffle. Build.

The Shuffle Cannon introduces a powerful new tool for builders who love variety and randomness!

With the Shuffle Cannon, you can select a set of blocks and place them randomly with a single click, making it easier than ever to create textured builds, natural landscapes, or chaotic designs.

## Showcase ### Placing random blocks ![Block placing showcase](https://github.com/DiegoRevenga/the-shuffle-cannon/blob/main/assets/block_placing_showcase.gif?raw=true) ### Shuffle Cannon GUI `Shift + right click` opens a menu that lets you choose which blocks will the Shuffle Cannon shoot and adjust their frequency. ![GUI showcase](https://github.com/DiegoRevenga/the-shuffle-cannon/blob/main/assets/gui_showcase.gif?raw=true) ### Recipe ![Recipe](https://github.com/DiegoRevenga/the-shuffle-cannon/blob/main/assets/recipe.png?raw=true) ### 3D Model ![3D Model](https://github.com/DiegoRevenga/the-shuffle-cannon/blob/main/assets/3d_model.png?raw=true)
